What We Do

One partner, from concept sketch to commissioned line.

N R Engineers designs, builds, integrates and services automation equipment in-house — so the machine you spec is the machine that lands on your shop floor.

01 — DESIGN & BUILD

Special Purpose Machines

SPMs engineered for leak testing, endurance testing, auto-measuring, assembly and complete line setups — built around your part, not a catalogue.

02 — INTEGRATION

PLC / HMI / SCADA

Programming and integration across Siemens, Mitsubishi, Omron and National Instruments platforms, with servo-based motion where precision matters.

03 — ROBOTICS

Robotic Welding & Handling

Authorised distributor for OTC DAIHEN robots — deployed for welding, material handling and fully robotic assembly fixtures.

04 — UPGRADE

Process & Equipment Upgradation

Retrofits and technology upgrades for existing lines focused on productivity, safety and product quality — including Kaizen and Poka-Yoke implementation.

05 — ADVISORY

Training & Consultancy

Hands-on industrial automation training and consultancy for plant teams adopting PLC-driven, sensor-based production.

06 — REACH

Export-Ready Engineering

Machines designed, built and commissioned for customers beyond India, to the same documentation and quality standard.

Future-Ready

Built for Industry 4.0.

Our SPMs and lines aren't just automated — they're built to connect. Auto data-logging, networked PLC/HMI architecture and sensor-driven feedback are standard practice on our machines, not an add-on.

SMART MANUFACTURING ON THE FLOOR

  • Auto data-logging on test & inspection SPMs for traceability
  • PLC/HMI/SCADA architecture ready for plant-wide networking
  • Sensor-based feedback loops for real-time quality monitoring

WHY IT MATTERS FOR YOUR LINE

  • Production data captured at source — no manual logging
  • Faster root-cause analysis with machine-level traceability
  • Lines designed to plug into your existing MES/IoT roadmap
In-House Capability

Mechanical and electrical, under one roof.

MECHANICAL

  • 2 dedicated design seats running SolidEdge 2D & 3D
  • Full 3D simulation before a single part is machined
  • In-house fixture, fabrication & assembly capability

ELECTRICAL

  • PLC programming — Mitsubishi, Omron, Siemens
  • Servo-based motion & control systems
  • Laser systems and National Instruments platforms
